note: Reference-only sample log. Do not import third-party images into the renderer. Use links and observations to guide primitive design.
coreAnchors: dark throat with small stamens/style detail

samples.sourceType: web image result / anatomy front view
samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.primitiveInsight: A front-facing trumpet-throat cannot be an empty cup; add small internal reproductive marks.
samples.avoid: Do not use a pure hole or flat center dot.

samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.primitiveInsight: Add a green back tube/ovary base instead of attaching the cup directly to a stem.
samples.avoid: Do not add a rose-like green calyx star.

samples.sourceType: web image result / annotated garden daffodil
samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.primitiveInsight: Use rim color contrast as a quick recognition cue.
samples.avoid: Do not make the rim a perfect smooth circle.

samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.primitiveInsight: White tepals plus yellow corona is the clearest default Narcissus read.
samples.avoid: Do not let the cup cover all six tepals.

samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.primitiveInsight: The cup needs inner shading and radial wall direction.
samples.avoid: Do not make the corona look like a plastic cone.

samples.sourceType: web image result / side corona diagram
samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.primitiveInsight: Side view must read as cup-on-star, not a flat flower disk.
samples.avoid: Do not make all flowers front-facing.

samples.sourceType: web image result / Narcissus tazetta dissection
samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.primitiveInsight: Support a short-cup variant, not only long trumpet variants.
samples.avoid: Do not make every Narcissus form one fixed trumpet length.

samples.sourceType: web image result / daffodil center macro
samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.primitiveInsight: A small amount of rim asymmetry makes the flower less abstract.

samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.primitiveInsight: Allow high corona-to-tepal ratio as an optional variant.
samples.avoid: Do not use this extreme ratio as the default DailyFlora form.

samples.licenseNote: link-only; verify before any asset use
samples.avoid: Do not keep every head upright and flat.
